prestazioni: Engine swap to a **13B-REW twin-rotor Wankel** (from the FD3S RX-7) with a **Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger** (82mm compressor, 1.06 A/R turbine housing) and **Tomei 272°/272° camshafts** for extended powerband, paired with a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** for precise fuel and ignition mapping (targeting 450whp on E85 with a 12.5:1 effective compression ratio).

Full **PPRE Racing** peripheral porting kit (custom-machined rotor housings, apex seals, and side seals) with **Ferrea titanium intake valves** and **Supertech valve springs** to handle 10,000+ RPM reliability, backed by a **GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller** and **HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve** for instant spool response.

Custom **Nismo 4.11:1 final drive ratio** (JC-specific) paired with a **PPG straight-cut dog engagement gearset** (1st-4th gears) in the **Mazdaspeed JC 5-speed transmission**, reinforced with a **PPRE Racing billet aluminum bellhousing** and **South Bend Stage 3 twin-disc clutch** (ceramic puck, 1,200 lb-ft capacity) for drag-strip launches.
estetica: **Veilside Fortune 99 widebody kit** (JC-specific, 3-piece FRP construction) with **custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap** and **Rocket Bunny-style overfenders** (hand-laid carbon fiber, 50mm wider front/70mm wider rear), paired with **Work Meister S1 3P 18x10.5 +25/18x12 +35 wheels** (gold finish, 275/35R18 and 315/30R18 tires).

**JC-specific C-West front bumper** (carbon fiber, integrated tow hooks) with a **Seibon carbon fiber hood** (vented, 3.5kg weight reduction) and **RE Amemiya GT-II rear wing** (dual-element, 1,200mm span, adjustable angle for 200+ kg downforce at 160mph).

**Full interior overhaul** with **Recaro SRD-E full carbon bucket seats** (JC-specific mounting brackets), **Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses**, **Momo Prototipo steering wheel** (350mm, suede), and **Defi BF Advance gauges** (oil pressure, boost, AFR) mounted in a **custom carbon fiber A-pillar pod**.
